item.description:
# VISH 0.1.0 Alpha 4
This alpha fixes the update flow.
- Sparkle builds now ship with a real feed URL and EdDSA public key. - The app uses Sparkle for update checks when configured. - Local or custom builds without Sparkle config now open GitHub Releases instead of showing developer environment variables. - Release packaging now generates a signed `appcast.xml` with monotonic Sparkle build versions.
Still alpha: the app is locally signed and not notarized yet.
